footer.tagline: Crafting spaces that reflect who you are. In a world defined by the spaces we inhabit, we believe every room should be a statement of self.

hero.title: Comfortable Living.
hero.subtitle: Crafting spaces that define how you live.

showcase.title: Community Showcase
showcase.body: See where your creativity takes you when ComfyHome provides the freedom to our dearest customers to design their own furniture. Many great contributions to the community have been made through our open design platform — from intimate reading nooks to statement dining rooms.

gallery.body: Aesthetic furniture where every piece tells a story of refined taste and timeless craftsmanship.

feature.body: Indulge in the artistry of bespoke living — choose your fabric, finish, and form.

about.title: Modern Style
about.body: Discover ComfyHome's latest collection, featuring sofas, chairs, and armchairs embodying diverse lifestyle concepts — alongside striking tables, coffee tables, and sideboards crafted for the discerning home. Founded on the belief that beauty and comfort are never in conflict, every piece we create carries a quiet confidence meant to outlast trends.

explore.title: Explore Our Products
explore.body: ComfyHome will showcase its vision of contemporary architecture and interior design through every carefully curated category.

products.title: Our Collection
products.subtitle: Curated furniture for every room in your home

furniture
cta.body: Choose from 18 furniture types and fully customize materials, finishes, and dimensions — then share it with the community.

customize.title: Design Your Furniture
customize.subtitle: Craft something uniquely yours — choose shape, material, colour, fabric and watch your design come to life in real-time 3D.
customize.selectPrompt: Select a furniture type above to start customising.
customize.previewSub: Select a furniture type to begin

locations.title: Find a Branch Near You
locations.subtitle: Visit one of our showrooms across Malaysia. Experience ComfyHome furniture in person with expert guidance from our in-store team.
locations.mapHint: Set VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in your .env and restart the dev server.

cart.title: My Cart
cart.ctaBody: Browse hundreds of handcrafted furniture pieces for every room — or design something entirely your own.

furnitureViewer.hint: Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom

s1.title: Choose Your Living Area
s1.desc: Start by selecting a room: Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen, Bathroom, or Study Room. Each area surfaces furniture types perfectly suited for the space.

s2.title: Customise Every Detail
s2.desc: Pick a furniture type, then dial in every configuration: shape, fabric, material, colour, and leg style — all in one streamlined panel.

s3.title: Preview in 3D
s3.desc: Your selections render live in the 3D viewer. Rotate and inspect the model as you tweak options to see exactly how your piece will look.

s4.title: Real-Time Price Updates
s4.desc: The price summary updates instantly with every choice. You always see a transparent breakdown — no surprises when you reach the cart.

s5.title: Add to Cart or Contribute
s5.desc: Happy with your design? Add it straight to your cart, or share it as a community showcase piece for others to discover and order.
